_comment: Curated slayer best-in-slot data. Lists are best-first; the plugin shows the first item you own and otherwise your best owned item for the slot. 'slayerLevel' and 'difficulty' are metadata.

monsters.groupNote: Pick the dragon you're fighting - they all count for the Metal dragons task.
monsters.notes: Metal dragons can be any of six dragon types; choose which you're killing to see its best-in-slot gear. All breathe dragonfire, so keep antifire or anti-dragon protection up.
Bring antifire protection.
Bring antifire; Ranged/Magic recommended.
Bring antifire; Ranged/Magic recommended.
Bring antifire; Ranged recommended (Ancient Cavern).
monsters.warningNote: Mithril dragons have long-range dragonfire that can hit 50+, so keep antifire coverage up at all times. With a dragonfire shield/ward or anti-dragon shield you only need a regular antifire; without dragonfire-protection gear use an extended (super) antifire. Protect from Magic does NOT reduce dragonfire.

monsters.notes: Requires Dragon Slayer II; super antifire needed.
monsters.warningNote: Adamant dragons fire a poison projectile (up to 25) - wear poison protection (Serpentine helm, or an antidote++ / antidote+) to cut it, or step away to dodge it. Their Blood Forfeit ranged attack pierces Protect from Missiles for ~20% of your current HP, so keep your HP moderate and use Vengeance to punish it. Keep antifire up for the dragonfire.

monsters.notes: Requires Dragon Slayer II; super antifire needed.
monsters.warningNote: Rune dragons' Electricity special arcs across nearby tiles for rapid 2-5 hits; Insulated boots reduce this to 1-2 (or move away). Their Life Leech ranged attack hits through Protect from Missiles and heals the dragon, so cast Vengeance when a purple hitsplat appears. Keep super antifire up for the dragonfire.

monsters.notes: Bring antifire protection.
Catacombs of Kourend; bring antifire. Ranged is standard.

Use Melee or Ranged depending on the variant.
Basic mid-level melee task.
Shamans drop the Dragon warhammer. Regular lizardmen are weak to stab (cannon/melee them); range shamans and pray Protect from Missiles.
monsters.requiredGearNote: Lizardman shamans' poison spit can hit up to 30 - a full set of tier-5 Shayzien armour blocks it entirely. With the Hard Kourend & Kebos Diary, Captain Cleive can make your Slayer helmet count as the Shayzien helm, so you keep its bonus. The regular lizardmen don't need Shayzien.

Bring antifire - he uses all dragonfire colours. Ranged from a distance is safest.

Undead dragon: Salve amulet (ei) beats Anguish here. Bring an extended super antifire AND an anti-dragon/Dragonfire ward (or pray Protect from Missiles). Dragon hunter crossbow with Ruby dragon bolts (e) until ~33% HP, then Diamond dragon bolts (e). Requires Dragon Slayer II.
Bandos GWD boss; melee or ranged. Needs Bandos killcount to enter.
Saradomin GWD boss; usually meleed with a stab weapon (rapier/whip). Needs Saradomin killcount.
Armadyl GWD boss; he flies, so use Ranged or Magic. Needs Armadyl killcount.
Zamorak GWD boss; melee with Protect from Magic. Needs Zamorak killcount.
Three kings - Rex (Melee), Supreme (Ranged), Prime (Magic); bring multiple styles.
The Rat King; a simple, beginner-friendly melee boss.
Tank with high Ranged defence and pray Protect from Melee (their ranged hits through prayer). Draconic, so Dragon hunter weapons and dragon bolts (e) apply. 66 Slayer (82 for the Ancient Wyvern).
monsters.requiredGearNote: Wyverns' icy breath hits 50+ - you must wear ANY ONE of these shields to block it (an Anti-dragon shield does NOT work). Only the Ancient wyvern shield also stops the freeze.

monsters.notes: Duo boss in the Asgarnia Ice Dungeon: Branda the Fire Queen and Eldric the Ice King (600 HP each, Defence 100). No requirements to enter. Counts for both Fire giants and Ice giants Slayer tasks - your Slayer helmet (i) only buffs the matching boss for your current task (Fire giants -> Branda; Ice giants -> Eldric). Mechanic-heavy: pray Protect from Melee for Stomp; clear icicle/fire walls and opposing-element elementals with Water/Fire Blast (or higher); avoid the phase-2 Elemental Blast safe-tile.
monsters.warningNote: Royal Titans is a mechanic-heavy duo. The Twinflame staff auto-swaps Fire/Water spells, so you can clear icicle/fire walls and one-shot the opposite-element elementals (Water vs fire elementals, Fire vs ice; they self-destruct for 8-10 in a 3x3 if ignored). The Antler guard is a useful ranged off-hand when you switch off melee. Bring a Lightbearer + spec weapon (Dragon claws / Burning claws) to repeat specs across the fight.
